name: Frappe/ERPNext Federated Bridge
description: Permission-scoped Frappe/ERPNext tools with federated OAuth identity. Every read and write executes as the paired Frappe user; Frappe remains the only authorization authority. Ported from the production frappe2-openclaw-gateway: identity resolution, customization context (custom fields, property setters, workflows, scripts), semantic data resolution with domain DocType priors validated against the live site index, error-aware fetch diagnostics, and artifact dataset export.
status: scaffold: manifest + contract only. Implementation lands after the capability-pack loader (HC-012) ships; the reference implementation runs in production at frappe2-openclaw-gateway.
